source_name: Code4rena Wise Lending Findings & Analysis Report (2024-02)
finding_title: User can erase their position debt for free
summary: Wise Lending 在 bad debt repay 路径中把未校验的 poolToken 传入 position token list 删除逻辑；当 token 不在用户数组中时，内部删除流程会清掉错误的 debt position，使用户可以免费抹除债务。
root_cause: position cleanup assumes the supplied pool token exists in the user position token list and deletes debt state without proving membership
broken_invariants: repay or bad-debt helper code must only remove position entries that are actually owned by the position
debt accounting must not be zeroed by passing a token that is absent from the authoritative position token list
attack_preconditions: 攻击者拥有或控制一个借贷 position
存在可触发 bad-debt repay / position cleanup 的路径，且该路径可传入不属于 position 的 token
attacker_capability: position owner or external caller able to reach the bad-debt repayment cleanup path with a crafted pool token
trigger_actions: call the bad-debt repayment path with a repay token absent from the user token array
let _removePositionData delete the wrong/last debt position entry

impact.description: attacker can erase position debt without paying the corresponding liability, creating protocol bad debt

why_not_higher: 保留 final report High；实际范围取决于可清除债务规模和触发路径。
why_not_lower: 直接破坏债务账本，导致免费债务清除。
common_false_positive_angles: 确认当前协议的 position token list 是否是权威账本，而不是可重建缓存
确认删除函数是否先验证 membership；如果不存在可外部触发的 cleanup 路径则不能类比为 HM
mitigations: 删除 position 数据前验证 token membership；若 token 不在 position token list 中直接 revert。
